title: Constant Contact vs Ghost (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Constant Contact vs Ghost: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Constant Contact vs Ghost: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Constant Contact and Ghost comes down to your specific use case. Constant Contact is built for nonprofits and local businesses, while Ghost targets writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

comparison_table.tool_b: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses

faq.q: Is Constant Contact better than Ghost?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Constant Contact wins for nonprofits and local businesses, while Ghost is stronger for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Constant Contact or Ghost?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Ghost to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
